title: Scared to spend your retirement money? Here’s one way to get over the fear of running out.
summary: This article addresses the psychological barriers to spending retirement savings, highlighting how fear of depletion can undermine financial well-being. The piece offers strategies to help retirees overcome this anxiety and make confident spending decisions.
content: This fear is probably going to cause you some regrets.

zh.title: 害怕花费退休储蓄？这是克服资金耗尽恐惧的一种方法
zh.summary: 本文讨论了花费退休储蓄的心理障碍，强调了对资金耗尽的恐惧如何会削弱财务福祉。文章提供了帮助退休人员克服这种焦虑并做出自信支出决策的策略。

title: I inherited a $500,000 IRA. Can I reduce the tax burden by using it for my children’s education?
summary: A person who inherited a $500,000 IRA seeks to minimize tax impact by redirecting funds toward their three children's college education. The article explores strategies for optimizing inherited retirement account distributions.
content: “I would like to use my share to help fund college for my three children.”

zh.title: 我继承了50万美元的个人退休账户。我能否通过将其用于孩子的教育来减少税负？
zh.summary: 一个继承了50万美元个人退休账户的人寻求通过将资金转向三个孩子的大学教育来最小化税收影响。该文章探讨了优化已继承退休账户分配的策略。

title: Inside India newsletter: Anthropic curbs ignite AI debate in India — efforts 'too slow, way too small'
summary: Anthropic's operational constraints are sparking debate in India about the country's AI development ambitions. Critics argue that India's reliance on foreign foundational models requires faster, more substantial local innovation efforts.
content: India's ambitions of becoming a global AI innovation powerhouse by building applications on top of foreign foundational models are being challenged.

zh.title: 印度内部通讯：Anthropic的限制措施引发印度AI辩论——努力"速度太慢，规模太小"
zh.summary: Anthropic的运营限制在印度引发了关于该国AI发展雄心的辩论。批评人士辩称，印度对外国基础模型的依赖需要更快、更实质性的本地创新努力。

title: Rumble gets 22,000 Nvidia chips, but the video company’s CEO insists this isn’t a fad-like pivot
summary: Rumble acquired 22,000 Nvidia chips for AI expansion, with its CEO defending the move as a strategic pivot rather than a passing trend. The decision reflects the company's serious commitment to artificial intelligence infrastructure.
content: Is Rumble’s AI expansion just Allbirds 2.0 — or a move modeled after Elon Musk?

zh.title: Rumble获得22,000块Nvidia芯片，但该视频公司CEO坚称这不是风尚般的转向
zh.summary: Rumble为AI扩展收购了22,000块Nvidia芯片，其CEO为这一举措辩护，称其为战略转向而非昙花一现的趋势。该决定反映了公司对人工智能基础设施的坚定承诺。
